1708350.name: The Surelock Agency
1708350.description:
You work at a Private Investigation company, who accept client's requests for investigations and recoveries. Unfortunately for you, you're assigned the graveyard shift, working for clients only in the darkest hours of the night.

Solve the Case


Take on a case, and use your detective skills! Look for clues, examine crime scenes, and talk to citizens that may provide help or insight. Things aren't always what they appear, and keeping calm and collected is key to finishing the job and getting out alive.

Online Multiplayer


Play solo or play Online Multiplayer with up to 4 Friends. Use built-in voice chat to communicate.

Inventory Management


Find and utilize different items for your job like flares, screwdrivers, crowbars, and more.
1708350.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
